title: Donut Vanilla
description: This is a modpack that has DrDonut's Vanilla Minecraft mods.
body:
# DrDonut vanilla mods

These mods were found on his stream.
Some mods might be missing or wrong.

**_If there is any missing/wrong mods please submit it in the Discord server._**

Please enjoy this vanilla PvP experience! I hope you like it.

## Supported Versions:
 - Version 1.21.11 ✅
 - Version 26 and up ❌

More versions will be added soon.

--------------------------------
My Discord: drdonutify
